untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'Estimated Fundamental Value' which is not an available indicator. The rule depends on a fundamental valuation model that must be computed externally and provided as an input parameter. Current ALLOWED_INDICATORS set contains only price action, moving averages, and technical oscillators—no fundamental value estimate or valuation confidence scoring mechanism is available.
translation_notes: Translated entry/exit conditions using normalized relative price movements as proxy (±3% / ±1%) since fundamental value cannot be computed from allowed indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification. Stop loss at 3% adverse move per exit conditions. Hold period constraints: min 5 days, max 30 days. Regime filter: HIGH_VOL as specified. Position sizing based on conviction level cannot be implemented in rule engine—must be handled externally.
